name: inochi
description: Inochi, a self-hosted Discord leveling bot and dashboard.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @inochi/api-contract && npm run build -w @inochi/sdk && npm run build -w @inochi/bot && npm run build -w @inochi/web
scripts.dev: concurrently -n bot,web -c white,gray "npm run dev -w @inochi/bot" "npm run dev -w @inochi/web"
scripts.test: tsx tests/run.ts && npm test -w @inochi/importers && npm test -w @inochi/api-contract && npm test -w @inochi/sdk
